Call ID: EXT-031
Type: external
Date: 2026-04-27
Topic: Product Feedback
Participants: Fatima (account manager); Priya (customer)
------------------------------------------------------------
AM (Fatima): Hi Priya, thanks for making time today. How are things going on your side?
Customer (Priya): We love the core product but the integrations feel limited.
AM (Fatima): I'll flag the usability feedback; we're actively investing there.
Customer (Priya): We've had a mixed experience, to be candid.
AM (Fatima): Let me connect you with our product team for a feedback session.
Customer (Priya): Good conversation — send me that summary and we'll align internally.
AM (Fatima): Thank you — I'll send a recap with clear next steps and owners by end of day.
